siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: Helen. Rounds for Time: 400m Run, 21 Kettlebell Swings, 53# / 35#, 12 Pull-ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, biceps, core stability.
